ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "master_id" INTEGER /* Master identifier linking multiple observations of the same object */,
  "object_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the observed celestial object */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the observed object */,
  "magnitude_error" REAL /* Error in magnitude measurement */,
  "right_ascension" REAL /* Right ascension of the observed object */,
  "declination" REAL /* Declination of the observed object */,
  "fwhm" REAL /* Full width at half maximum of the observed object's image */,
  "variability" INTEGER /* Indicator of variability (0 for constant, 1 for variable) */,
  "frame_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the frame in which the observation was made */,
  "modified_julian_date" REAL /* Modified Julian Date of the observation */,
  "airmass" REAL /* Airmass at the time of observation */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time for the observation */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X position of the object in the frame */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y position of the object in the frame */,
  "flux" REAL /* Flux of the observed object */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the object's image */,
  "flags" REAL /* Flags indicating issues or special characteristics of the observation */,
  "theta" REAL /* Position angle of the major axis of the object's image */,
  "elongation" REAL /* Elongation of the object's image */,
  "mu_max" REAL /* Maximum surface brightness of the object */,
  "blend" INTEGER /* Blend flag indicating if the object is blended with others */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the telescope used */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "data_processing_status" TEXT /* Status of data processing (e.g., raw, processed, archived) */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES celestial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "celestial_objects" (
  "object_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each celestial object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Common name or designation of the object */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of celestial object (e.g., star, galaxy, comet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the celestial object */,
  "constellation" TEXT /* Constellation in which the object is located */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the object in light-years */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the object */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was discovered */,
  "discoverer" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who discovered the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescopes" (
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telescope */,
  "telescope_name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the telescope */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for observation */,
  "aperture" REAL /* Aperture of the telescope in meters */,
  "focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the telescope in meters */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the telescope in arcseconds */,
  "first_operational_date" TEXT /* Date when the telescope became operational */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the telescope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the frame */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telescope used */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the frame was observed */,
  "exposure" REAL /* Exposure time for the frame */,
  "filter" TEXT /* Filter used for the observation */,
  "frame_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the frame (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the frame */,
  "processing_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the frame processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., astronomer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing log */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing was performed */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing (e.g., calibration, noise reduction) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation request */,
  "object_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the celestial object */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the observation */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the request */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_requests_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES celestial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation schedule */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the telescope */,
  "object_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the celestial object */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation is scheduled */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the observation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the observation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_schedules_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES celestial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_schedules_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescope_maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the telescope */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telescope_maintenance_logs_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data product */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of data product (e.g., image, spectrum) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the data product is stored */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data product in megabytes */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data product was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data product (e.g., available, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_products_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_product_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_product_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES data_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_product_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
